outputs: Stairwell B: do not hum back. This is not a test.
sleep denied: terminals are not permitted to dream during business hours
Mirror audit complete: one reflection late, none missing.
warnings: Staff who experience nostalgia while reading a terminal output should record the sensation under routine environmental discomfort, not memory recall.
When a command returns silence, the silence should be treated as a complete sentence for the purpose of audit review.
The operator should read the output only once. A second reading may produce a different room but the same filing requirement.
